articles.title: Lighting the spark: GACTC expands to welcome more female students enrolling in male-dominated trades
articles.description: Young women are coming in large numbers to pick up trade skills in male-dominated fields, leaving trade schools like Greater Altoona Career and Technology Center with a need to expand their program offerings. The center outgrew the female locker room and installed 30 additional lockers during summer 2025 to accommodate the increasing number of high […]
articles.content:
Young women are coming in large numbers to pick up trade skills in male-dominated fields, leaving trade schools like Greater Altoona Career and Technology Center with a need to expand their program offerings.

articles.title: Trump UFO Directive Could Shake Religion Science And Power Structures Worldwide
articles.description: By Samuel A. Lopez | USA Herald - Something unusual is happening in Washington. President Donald Trump has ordered federal agencies to release long-classified UFO and unidentified aerial phenomena records. And depending on what emerges, the consequences could extend far beyond science or national security. The potential impact may reach into something far deeper: human belief itself. For Trump’s UFO disclosure directive could shake science, religion, and global power structures as questions grow about alien technology, consciousness, and hidden government research.
articles.content: By Samuel A. Lopez | USA Herald - Something unusual is happening in Washington. President Donald Trump has ordered federal agencies to release long-classified UFO and unidentified aerial phenomena records. And depending on what emerges, the consequen... [6743 chars]

articles.title: UK Poised to Battle Drone Threats with Advanced Interceptor Technology
articles.description: The UK is considering deploying interceptor drones to the Middle East, utilizing the British-manufactured 'Octopus' system. Originally designed to aid Ukraine against Russia, these drones may now reinforce defenses against Iran's Shahed drones. Military officials are assessing this strategic move, as reported by The Telegraph.
articles.content: The British government is contemplating the deployment of interceptor drones to the Middle East, as per a report by The Telegraph. The discussion surrounds the potential use of the 'Octopus' anti-drone system, which is designed in the UK for Ukrainia... [501 chars]

articles.title: Over 4500 students receive degrees during 42nd Convocation of Banasthali Vidyapith
articles.description: Excelsior Correspondent JAMMU, Mar 14: Foundation of NEP 2020 must have been based on Banasthali’s Panchmukhi Shiksha. This was stated by Prof. Anil D. Sahasrabudhe at 42nd convocation of Banasthali Vidyapith held today. Prof. Anil D. Sahasrabudhe, the Chairman of National Educational Technology Forum (NETF), Government of India, was chief guest of the convocation during which over 4500 students received their graduate, post graduate, doctoral degrees and 111 students received their gold medals. Earlier, the Vice Chancellor, Prof. Ina Aditya […]

articles.title: Hollywood's biggest filmmaker just came out clean about using AI in movies
articles.description: Steven Spielberg says he has never used AI in his films and believes the technology should not replace human creativity in filmmaking, speaking at SXSW 2026.

articles.title: Trump UFO Directive Could Shake Religion Science And Power Structures Worldwide
articles.description: By Samuel A. Lopez | USA Herald - Something unusual is happening in Washington. President Donald Trump has ordered federal agencies to release long-classified UFO and unidentified aerial phenomena records. And depending on what emerges, the consequences could extend far beyond science or national security. The potential impact may reach into something far deeper: human belief itself. For Trump’s UFO disclosure directive could shake science, religion, and global power structures as questions grow about alien technology, consciousness, and hidden government research.
